title: Japanese Lamb Skewers
description: Grilled lamb skewers with a charred flavor, inspired by Japanese cuisine.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together soy sauce, honey, and brown sugar.
2. Add the lamb cubes to the marinade and mix until coated.
3. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
4. Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
5. Thread the marinated lamb onto skewers.
6. Brush the lamb with sesame oil and season with salt and pepper.
7. Grill the lamb for 8-10 minutes per side, or until charred and cooked through.
8. Brush the lamb with charred wood chips during the last 2 minutes of grilling.
9. Garnish with chopped green onions and serve immediately.
